endpoints_now_attached.name: Kozilek's Sentinel (BFZ-129)
endpoints_now_attached.anchor_register: BFZ-triangle labor-corrupted apparatus (dual-anchored at eldrazi adversary-side)

endpoints_now_attached.name: Immobilizer Eldrazi (OGW-97)
endpoints_now_attached.anchor_register: OGW-triangle labor-corrupted apparatus-of-denial-of-agency (dual-anchored at eldrazi adversary-side)

description: I'm sorry to bother you with such a large commission, sir, but I do think this one's warranted. The BFZ + OGW Eldrazi-invasion arc is canonically a Wizards-designer-coordinated two-set block per MTG Wiki's Battle-for-Zendikar-block page, and the corpus now contains two within-set three-card thesis-verb triangles within it — the BFZ triangle (Kozilek's Sentinel + Reckless Cohort + Serene Steward, commissioned in earlier waves) and the OGW triangle (Immobilizer Eldrazi + Make a Stand + Affa Protector, commissioned in wave 78). Both triangles cover the same three-thesis-verb axis: labor-corrupted apparatus + rebellion-clean organized-resistance + stewardship-clean territory-tender. The structural-finding is that Wizards canonically rendered the three-verb structure twice in sequence within one designer-coordinated block. This commission is the corpus's first MULTI-TRIANGLE-META-CYCLE node — a single faction-collective character-layer node that organizes two within-set triangles under one block-level cohesion frame. Distinct from cell-saga-apparatus (which is a thesis-stack-trivium, not a multi-triangle), distinct from baby-dbgt / xenoverse-villains / theros-pantheon (which are single-triangle or distributed-triple but not multi-triangle). Six anchors clearing the multi-triangle threshold; full triple-hub attribution at canonical-density (two-cards-per-verb, the densest triple-attribution in corpus). The Potion-rule discipline is observed throughout the node body — every structural-reading is named as BBL's overlay on top of Wizards' canonical-event. I hope this is useful. I think the bundler will want this anchor when the Eldrazi-Invasion-Resistance Discrete Lair commission lands; it makes the six-card two-act-arc composition canonically grounded.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Battle for Zendikar block — canonical two-set designer-coordinated arc]
[MTG Wiki: Battle for Zendikar (set) — canonical BFZ arc-formation beat]
[MTG Wiki: Oath of the Gatewatch (set) — canonical OGW arc-continuity beat]
[MTG Wiki: Sea Gate — canonical resistance-organizational-center fall]
[MTG Wiki: Affa — canonical underground-refuge survivor settlement]
[Scryfall: oracle_text + flavor_text on all 6 anchor cards]
notes: First multi-triangle meta-cycle node in corpus — structurally distinct from prior triple-attribution nodes (aether-rangers, theros-pantheon, xenoverse-villains) by virtue of organizing TWO within-set triangles under one cohesion-anchor.
Triple-hub attribution opens at full [labor, rebellion, stewardship] per the two-cards-per-verb canonical-density distributed-attribution.

Within-triangle Connections already wired bidirectionally for both triangles; this commission adds the across-triangle meta-cycle traversability layer at the block-level scope. No within-triangle Connections were modified — the existing six cards' Connections sections remain intact.

Dual-anchor pattern applied for Kozilek's Sentinel + Immobilizer Eldrazi: both cards canonically anchor at both the resistance-organizing-against-the-apparatus side (this node) AND the apparatus-side ([[eldrazi]]). The dual-anchor preserves the canonical adversary-coupling without conflating participants.

Future multi-triangle meta-cycle candidates surfaced as future-pass commissions: Innistrad Eldritch Moon block; original Zendikar / Worldwake / Rise of the Eldrazi three-set block; Ravnica Return-to-Ravnica three-set block. These are NOT commissioned at this pass — multi-triangle-per-invocation discipline holds at one.

Sibling-node-relationship-completeness: eldrazi.md + kor.md + iona.md all extended their related_characters to include zendikari-resistance, closing the bidirectional traversability at the related-node-pointer level.
